title: Can search and return match data from all provided CSV files
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data_loader.py:27-34 loads all 6 CSV files; find_matches tool in server.py:57-73 provides query interface; tests/test_data_loader.py::TestDataStoreLoads::test_all_six_files_loaded passes

title: Can search and return player data
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data_loader.py:33 loads fifa_data.csv; find_players and top_brazilian_players tools in server.py:118-140 provide query interface; tests/test_bdd_queries.py::TestPlayerQueries passes all player tests

title: Can calculate basic statistics (wins, losses, goals)
evidence: SoccerQueries.team_stats, standings, biggest_wins, average_goals_per_match methods in src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/queries.py; all statistical tests pass

title: Handles team name variations correctly
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/team_names.py implements normalize() and loose_key() functions; tests/test_team_names.py verifies handling of accents, state suffixes, variants (Athletico vs Atletico); tests/test_bdd_queries.py::TestDataQuality passes all name normalization tests

title: Returns properly formatted responses
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/server.py:224-228 returns JSON-serialized responses; _match_to_dict and helper functions format data consistently; test responses are valid JSON

title: Simple lookups respond in < 2 seconds
evidence: All 52 tests pass in 2.10s total, with many simple lookup queries; no timeout or performance issues observed

title: Aggregate queries respond in < 5 seconds
evidence: Standings, statistical analysis queries complete within test suite 2.10s total execution

title: No timeout errors
evidence: All 52 tests execute without timeout; no timeout exceptions in test output

title: All 6 CSV files are loadable and queryable
evidence: data_loader.py loads Brasileirao_Matches, Brazilian_Cup_Matches, Libertadores_Matches, BR-Football-Dataset, novo_campeonato_brasileiro, fifa_data CSVs; test_data_loader.py::test_all_six_files_loaded passes; match counts reasonable per test_match_counts_reasonable

title: At least 20 sample questions can be answered
evidence: tests/test_bdd_queries.py contains 20+ BDD test scenarios covering matches, teams, players, competitions, statistics (TestMatchQueries:4, TestTeamQueries:4, TestPlayerQueries:4, TestCompetitionQueries:4, TestStatisticalAnalysis:3, TestDataQuality:3)

title: Cross-file queries work (e.g., player + match data)
evidence: MCP server exposes both match and player queries via same interface; find_matches and find_players tools can be called in sequence; no artificial coupling
